notes: feature_supported=False in baseline; VPN GW has no persistent customer data at rest; PSK in resource metadata not customer data for DP-4 purposes | Exa 2026-06-19: feature_supported=False in MCSB v3 baseline. feature_name: Key Management in Azure Key Vault
